articles.title: Royal Marines board Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in English Channel
articles.description: Marines were joined by National Crime Agency officers in the six-hour long operation in the early hours of Sunday.

articles.title: Watch: MOD video shows Russian shadow fleet tanker interception
articles.description: British armed forces boarded a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in the English Channel.

articles.title: Why Haiti v Scotland was antidote to the ills of world football
articles.description: It might have been nervy. It might not have been pretty. But Scotland are here. And Scotland have won. Tom English reports from Boston.

articles.title: Tech firms had 'enough time' says Nandy, ahead of social media announcement
articles.description: The prime minister is expected to announce measures on protecting teenagers online on Monday.
